MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-03-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AS ADMITTED IS GRANTED.(SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
